story.text:
# 💡 C77 · Integrity Gap ≡ Scales-vs-Hides
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Bakhta's integrity gap (architectural infeasibility of independent verification) and PVM's privacy-scales-vs-hides separation are one object — topological, not procedural. Active (60%).
